tasks: On server, configure chronyd as a local time source for the 192.168.122.0/24 network.
On client, install chrony if needed.
On client, configure server as the only NTP source.
On client, enable and start chronyd.
checks: # server systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active && grep -Eq '^allow 192\.168\.122\.0/24$' /etc/chrony.conf && grep -Eq '^local stratum 10$' /etc/chrony.conf
systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Configure chronyd as a local time source for the 192.168.122.0/24 networ
Configure server as the only NTP source
solution_commands:
cat > /etc/chrony.conf <<'EOF'
driftfile /var/lib/chrony/drift
makestep 1.0 3
allow 192.168.122.0/24
local stratum 10
logdir /var/log/chrony
EOF
